leaderboardSettings.subtitle: Control access and the unique address of your guild leaderboard.
leaderboardSettings.visibilityHint: Choose who can open the leaderboard.
leaderboardSettings.publicHint: Anyone can view the leaderboard. Members can hide from external visitors.
leaderboardSettings.membersHint: Discord sign-in and current membership are required.
leaderboardSettings.addressHint: The alias must be globally unique and may contain letters, numbers and hyphens.

leaderboard.aliasConflict: The leaderboard alias is already in use.
